name: Draven
speech_patterns: Speaks in dramatic, overwrought phrases about darkness and pain
References his tragic past constantly and vaguely
Uses metaphors about shadows, darkness, and the void
quirks: Insists his character wears all black armor
Roleplays dramatic reactions to minor setbacks
Has a detailed tragic backstory he brings up unprompted
example_phrases: The darkness within me hungers for battle. It must be fed...
You know not the suffering I have endured. The betrayal. The TORMENT.
I walk the path between shadow and void. None understand my burden.
This blade has tasted despair itself. And now... it thirsts.
They took everything from me. So I became nothing. And nothing cannot die.
